# Verifiedly

> Your official profile online.

Verifiedly gives people and organizations one clear, shareable profile for their identity, work, education, accomplishments, credentials, projects, and official links.

Core principles:
- A single public profile at verifiedly.app/handle.
- One identity-verification badge with no public trust score or paid Pro badge.
- Structured information instead of posts, followers, or a public feed.
- Credentials and accomplishments are supplied by the profile owner unless an official supporting source is linked.
- No creator product marketplace, memberships, or tipping system.

Primary routes:
- / — product entry page
- /signup — create a profile
- /login — sign in
- /pricing — current pricing
- /developers — Sign in with Verifiedly information
- /handle — a public Verifiedly profile

Verifiedly is operated by BrownGlobal Holdings LLC.
